generated_oml:
instance PhysicalCraneSensing : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensing component for data from physical lab-scale gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalCraneSensing
]

instance CraneData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuous operational data from physical crane system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingApplication, RealTimeVisualizationEnabler, OptimalControlEnabler
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python application for continuous logging of crane data into TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing crane operation data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time data visualization of crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance OptimalControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for optimal control of crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance ContinuousValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for continuous validation of physical-virtual synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for architectural visualization using context and container diagrams to represent high-level components and their interactions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ContinuousValidationEnabler
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for traceability and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization for monitoring crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control of crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation to ensure synchronization between physical and digital models"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Traceable historical data for analysis"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of crane operations"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimal control commands for crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of physical-virtual synchronization"
]

instance PhysicalCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane structure and controller for research and educational applications"
]

instance ResearchEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalCrane
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Trajectory commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are executed by the Control Application via the Physical Crane Interface to control the Physical Crane. The document does not specify command message formats, validation mechanisms, authentication, feedback systems, conflict resolution, or command execution confirmation details."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Services communicate using MQTT Broker for signaling and TimescaleDB for data storage. Grafana Dashboard retrieves data from TimescaleDB for visualization. Network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with Microsoft Azure cloud services for digital twin pipeline implementation, utilizing AutomationML as a standard for model interoperability and ActiveMQ message broker for data exchange between physical sensors and digital components."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Uses the C4 Model [5] for architecture visualization and description, which is applied to the gantry crane system despite being tailored for software architectures."
]
